messages.content: You are monitoring one radio-frequency band across a sequence of scans. Every scan shows the peaks a noisy detector found, each with a frequency, a power and a width. For each scan, call the submit_report tool with two same-length arrays: center_freqs, the center frequencies (MHz) of the regions you consider occupied, and bandwidths, their widths (MHz). Your score reflects how closely your report matches the band's true occupancy. Reason briefly — a sentence or two — before acting.
